message:
refactor(vdbe): add reset_for_reuse_ex with retain_cursors option (infrastructure)

Add reset_for_reuse_ex() that accepts a retain_cursors flag. When true,
storage_cursors, cursor_root_pages, and related state are preserved
across engine reuse calls. The existing reset_for_reuse() delegates
with retain_cursors=false for backward compatibility.

Currently NOT activated (callers still pass false / use the wrapper)
because StorageCursor holds Rc<RefCell<TransactionKind>> which is
recreated on each set_transaction() call. Activating retain_cursors
would cause cursors to reference a dropped Rc.

Full activation requires either:
1. Sharing the same Rc across set_transaction calls (engine refactor)
2. Moving cursor caching to the Connection level
3. Using a stable handle ID instead of Rc for transaction references

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
